mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM passwords WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
AND (site_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM passwords WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO passwords (user_id, site_name, site_url, username, encrypted_password, note) VALUES (#{userId}, #{siteName}, #{siteUrl}, #{username}, #{encryptedPassword}, #{note})
mapper.update:
UPDATE passwords
site_name = #{siteName}, site_url = #{siteUrl}, username = #{username}, encrypted_password = #{encryptedPassword}, note = #{note},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE passwords SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
